feature_bullets: ADVANCED 8-STAGE FILTRATION SYSTEM: This bath filter for tub removes up to 99% of chlorine, heavy metals, and harmful contaminants, providing cleaner and gentler bath water for your family.

BATHTUB WATER FILTER FOR SENSITIVE SKIN: This bathtub filter for tub faucet helps provide a gentler bathing experience, especially for skin prone to irritation or dryness. Give your child a bath free of harsh chemicals and to support a healthier skin barrier.
OVERFLOW SOLUTION FOR PEACE OF MIND: Tubo’s upgraded design prevents overflow, even with strong water pressure, ensuring a safe and easy bath experience. That's one less thing to worry about!

HASSLE-FREE INSTALLATION: Setting up this water filter for bathtubs is a breeze! Tubo attaches to most standard tub faucets quickly, giving you immediate access to filtered water without the need for tools.

LONG-LASTING & TRAVEL-FRIENDLY: The compact design of this bathtub faucet filter ensures clean bathwater for your little one, even on family holidays. Throw it in your bag and enjoy fresh bath water absolutely anywhere!

top_reviews.title: Bath filter
top_reviews.body: Works very well for my kids who has eczema.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on 24 February 2026

top_reviews.title: Healed my baby’s skin
top_reviews.body: Fixed our baby’s eczema! We have hard water and our son had really bad eczema. We noticed that on vacation his eczema cleared up and figured maybe it was the water. We started using this at home and haven’t had any breakouts! Definitely works and is easy to use.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on 15 April 2026

top_reviews.title: Broke after 2 months
top_reviews.body: The product broke after 2 months and now the only way I can filter the water is by holding it under the faucet the entire time and that’s just not practical. Disappointed

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on 27 March 2026

top_reviews.title: Love it
top_reviews.body: LOVE this filter. Easy to use and does the job

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on 4 November 2025

top_reviews.title: works well in the beginning
top_reviews.body: This is not my first bath filter. It worked well. We have eczema and I am allergic to chlorine which is in my water so it does filter a lot out, I can tell since I am allergic that it did work ! I changed the Filter when it was time and in a month it smelt like mold and infact started to mold.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on 9 April 2026
